arts.ttl: How to watch RB Leipzig vs Aston Villa: TV channel and live stream for Champions League today
arts.sum: Unai Emery’s side looking to get back on track in Europe

arts.ttl: Unai Emery relishing chance to take Villa closer to knockout phase at RB Leipzig
arts.sum: A loss at Club Brugge and a draw at home to Juventus means Villa have failed to win either of their last two European games.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery urges Aston Villa to ‘break our limit’ against RB Leipzig
arts.sum: Victory will aid chances of place in knockout stage Villa face team yet to win a point in league phase Unai Emery has urged Aston Villa to “break our limit” by enhancing their chances of advancing automatically to the Champions League last 16 with victory against RB Leipzig. Villa, in Europe’s premier club competition for the first time since 1983, can take a major step towards the knockout phase if they can defeat the Bundesliga side, who have not registered a point after five matches. Villa arrived in Germany after successive Premier League victories and can return to winning ways on the continent after a shock defeat at Club Brugge and a draw at home against Juventus. Emery said Villa must learn their lesson from that difficult trip to Belgium against Leipzig, another team who will be considered underdogs, despite playing in the Champions League in six of the past seven seasons, reaching the semi-finals under Julian Nagelsmann four years ago. arts.ttl: Premier League announce TV fixture changes including huge Man Utd and Liverpool games
arts.sum: Manchester United have been selected for three TV matches in February, while Arsenal, Liverpool and Manchester City all have key fixtures being televised that month

arts.ttl: Team News: RB Leipzig vs. Aston Villa injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between RB Leipzig and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Leon Bailey injury update as Unai Emery gives Aston Villa team news ahead of RB Leipzig
arts.sum: Unai Emery has confirmed Leon Bailey will miss Aston Villa's Champions League clash against RB Leipzig on Tuesday, but he could return from his hamstring injury as soon as this weekend. Villa are currently sitting one point outside the top eight of the league phase table on goals scored, behind Monaco.

arts.ttl: Marco Rose reveals how Unai Emery 'makes it easier' as RB Leipzig boss delivers brutal truth
arts.sum: Leipzig ended that winless spell by winning two matches last week - just like Villa did - but they are only one of three clubs in the Champions League who are yet to pick up a single point after five matches after being defeated by Atletico Madrid, Juventus, Liverpool, Celtic and Inter. We have had success before and now we want to bring our fans a win in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa loanee given just 3/10 after being hauled off – Another relegation may be on way
arts.sum: Valencia are currently 19th out of the 20 clubs in La Liga. Getafe occupy the closest safety spot in 17th with three points more. Getafe have played a match more but even if Valencia won their game in hand they wouldn’t be safe to an inferior goal difference. arts.ttl: How much money Aston Villa have won in Champions League prize money so far
arts.sum: Aston Villa made the perfect return to the top table of European football by winning each of their first three Champions League games, but dropped out of the top eight of the league phase table after taking one point from games against Club Brugge and Juventus. Villa still have games to look forward to against RB Leipzig on Tuesday night, AS Monaco on January 21, before the final match against Celtic a week later on January 29.
James Milton assesses all 18 matches in the Champions League this week and delivers a score prediction for every game.
